name: Why does Siri forget what I was asking two minutes later?
description: Siri only keeps short conversational context. Use complete requests instead of expecting long memory.

mainEntity.name: Why does Siri forget what I was asking two minutes later?

acceptedAnswer.text: A common reason people think Siri optimization failed is that they expect Siri to remember context for too long. Siri can handle short follow-ups, but it does not maintain long, multi-day conversation history the way a human assistant would. Use complete requests rather than relying on memory from earlier.
acceptedAnswer.description: Siri only keeps short conversational context. Use complete requests instead of expecting long memory.
